THE_ARCHITECT.talk.MANOSABA_LIN_CHARACTE: I am angry at the architect
MANOSABA_LIN_ANCIENT_WITCHOFTHEISLAND.ta:
...You've finally come.
I've waited on this island for so long, even the tides have forgotten their direction.
Sit down, traveler. Let me see what stories you've brought.

You again? The sea wind always blows familiar faces back.
Come, let me prepare something different for you this time.

This island remembers every soul that has set foot upon it.
You're starting to be remembered too.

A witch's power is not a curse, but a choice.
Are you ready to make yours?
